metadata.description: Skills for driving and debugging Sparra — the autonomous build harness.

plugins.name: sparra
plugins.description: Drive and debug Sparra: collaborative plan → freeze → autonomous build → reflect over pluggable Claude/Codex agent backends — running/resuming builds, configuring .sparra/config.yaml, per-role backends, cross-backend evaluation, the iOS/macOS exerciser, holdout walls, and diagnosing runs from their on-disk artifacts.
